candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches Total Revenue amounts and is a non-total component, preferred over the total.
Royalty income is ancillary revenue; not the main top-line but listed in candidates.
Explicit total revenue line equal to Sales revenues; kept as secondary priority in case label changes over time.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Cost subtotal; not revenue.
Ancillary revenue; may be used if main sales line missing in some years.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Includes income, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Includes income, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Sales revenues is the primary operating revenue line; Total Revenue is maintained as a backup label in case of naming changes over time.

candidates.why: Main direct cost line corresponding to Sales revenues in recent years; best representation of COGS.
Adjustment component, not the primary COGS line.
Component of cost of revenues, but narrower than the main COGS line.
Government grants/reductions, not production costs.
COGS label used in earlier years; closely related but a separate period/format. Main current label is Cost of Revenues.
Component of production costs, not the main COGS aggregate.
Component of production costs, not the main COGS aggregate.
Capitalized R&D, not COGS.
Selling overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
Administrative overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
Broad employee cost bucket including overhead; not strictly direct COGS.
Employee overhead bucket; more SG&A than COGS.

candidates.row_label: Share-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A stock-based comp, not COGS.
General operating overhead, not direct production cost.
Part of operating expenses; may mix COGS and SG&A; less precise than main COGS line.
Net operating result, not a cost-of-sales line.
R&D, not COGS.
Capitalized R&D supplemental, not COGS.
Balance sheet item, not an income statement cost flow.

variables.notes: Cost of Revenues is the primary direct cost line matching Sales revenues and is preferred over subtotals or older-format labels like Cost of Goods Sold.

candidates.why: Production-related salary; more akin to COGS than SG&A overhead, so excluded.
Classic SG&A selling/marketing overhead component.
Classic SG&A administrative overhead component.
Employee-related overhead (non-production) and part of SG&A bucket in some years.

candidates.row_label: Share-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component to be included in SG&A.
Overhead operating expenses not in COGS; appropriate SG&A component (appears twice with same label; included once).

final_choice.row_label: Share-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected multiple SG&A-type overhead components and excluded production-related salary to avoid mixing COGS with SG&A.

candidates.why: Grants offsetting R&D; not the R&D expense itself.
R&D cost category but partially overlaps with other detailed R&D lines; less clearly the main expensed R&D line than the later aggregate.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: D&A component of R&D, not total R&D expense.
Capitalized R&D portion, not total R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Research and Development expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; not current period R&D spending.
Explicit aggregate R&D expense line; best match for total R&D (expensed).
Supplemental capitalized R&D info, not the main R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, not total R&D spend.
Balance sheet asset; not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment; not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: Research & Development Expense is the clearest single aggregate R&D expense line; capitalized and amortization components are excluded to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense from Laoans at Measured Costs
candidates.why: Interest expense on loans; part of total interest expense but appears with zeros in preview for most years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Main recurring interest expense on lease liabilities; best current representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail for the same lease interest; useful as fallback if primary line missing in some years.
Interest income, opposite sign to interest expense; not used for XINT which targets expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense from Laoans at Measured Costs
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list of interest expense labels: primary lease interest, then loan interest, then supplemental lease-interest detail; interest income is excluded.

candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total equity; BE should use an aggregate line.
Subtotal of equity components; does not necessarily represent total shareholders’ equity.
Aggregate shareholders’ equity line; no separate parent vs non-controlling interest line exists, so this is the appropriate BE proxy.
Technical balancing row, not the actual reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row; not an equity subtotal.
Total of equity plus liabilities, not pure equity.

variables.notes: No separate line for equity attributable to owners vs non-controlling interests exists, so Total Equity is used for BE as per instructions.
No line for minority interest/non-controlling interests appears in the balance sheet; MIB is therefore set to 0 via an empty selection.
